---
title: 'new pseudonym generated when rejoining a tasting as a participant'
---

# Context

As a participant when I join a tasting using the link provided by the host (ex: <https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/play?code=7498>)
Then I arrive in the lobby
AND I can see my pseudonym.
AND when I close my browser
AND when I reopen it and use the same link again <https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/play?code=7498>

# Actual

Then I get a new pseudonym.

# Expected

Then I should have the same pseudonym.
